title: Desktop Local Data Adapter
description: Electron desktop host concern — **Desktop Local Data Adapter**. Renderer-side `SpecdDataPort` that calls IPC instead of HTTP when the desktop app has opened a local project folder. Kernel ownership stays in the main process SDK host context — not in the renderer adapter.
context: Electron desktop host concern — **Desktop Local Data Adapter**. Renderer-side `SpecdDataPort` that calls IPC instead of HTTP when the desktop app has opened a local project folder. Kernel ownership stays in the main process SDK host context — not in the renderer adapter.

rules.requirement: local adapter is selected for opened project folders
rules: When the user opens a local project in desktop, the renderer MUST use this adapter instead of `adapter-remote-specd-data`.

rules.requirement: local adapter does not attach Authorization headers
rules: The local profile MUST NOT use `client:adapter-bearer-auth`.
The local data adapter MUST NOT call `createKernel` or `createSdkContext`. Kernel ownership remains in the Electron main process.

scenarios.requirement: local adapter is selected for opened project folders
scenarios.name: Renderer uses IPC adapter for local profile
when: the user opens a local project in desktop
then: the renderer uses this adapter instead of adapter-remote-specd-data
AND the adapter does not bootstrap a kernel — it calls IPC only

scenarios.requirement: local adapter does not attach Authorization headers
scenarios.name: IPC invoke has no Authorization metadata
then: IPC envelope has no bearer field
AND main process uses kernel actor resolver

scenarios.requirement: local adapter does not attach Authorization headers
scenarios.name: Accidental token in local profile is ignored
given: stale token stored from remote session
then: AND token not sent to main

scenarios.requirement: local adapter does not attach Authorization headers
scenarios.name: Remote adapter still attaches bearer when configured
then: AND local and remote paths differ by design

scenarios.name: Adapter does not call createSdkContext
when: the renderer uses the local data adapter
then: AND it does not import createSdkContext or createKernel
